prompt: An editorial photograph about extending a reliable smart-home Thread mesh through a real house without adding a second network. Show a warm, lived-in open-plan home where the living room leads naturally into a hallway and dining area, with several ordinary lamps steadily lit across the house. A homeowner in casual clothes kneels near a wall outlet in the middle of the home, thoughtfully placing a small plain white plug-in smart outlet adapter. Use clean high-end residential editorial photography, natural material grain, soft late-afternoon light, warm practical lamps, and restrained dark-green accents. Keep the central action readable in both 16:9 and 16:10 crops. No text, logos, brand marks, watermark, readable screens, futuristic technology, invented branded hardware, charts, graphs, routing or signal overlays, translucent panels, inset frames, floating UI cards, progress bars, icons, labels, or cutaway diagrams.
